redGreenRefactorEvidence.behavior: OAuth callback logs request_id on token exchange failure

implementationSummary: Adds TikTok request_id to oauth exchange failure logs, covers missing TIKTOK_APP_SECRET 503 path, and gitignores local .worktrees/ to prevent accidental staging.
assumptions: Core token exchange behavior remains on main from #270/#273
This slice only closes observability and test gaps for issue #274
risks: Live 502 triage still depends on valid VPS credentials and fresh auth codes
acceptanceCriteria: Token exchange failures log non-secret triage metadata including request_id
Regression tests pass for TikTok OAuth callback paths
